theory.canonical_statement: ID 419 establishes the stabilization protocol for sub nucleonic fluctuations at the TZP core. At the peak of the Transinfinity [ID 405], the localized energy density T00 exceeds the threshold for color de confinement, creating a infinitesimal residue of Quark Gluon Plasma (QGP). This operator ensures that the strong force interactions within this residue are pinned to the DAANSsphere lattice, preventing "Color Leakage" into the macroscopic manifold. By applying an SU(3) color charge normalization, the system utilizes the QGP residue as a "Super Fluid" lubricant for the Jp [ID 403]. This allows the vacuum flow to achieve near zero viscosity at the singularity, facilitating the extreme rotational velocities required for the Furiene Turbine.
